name: edge-waf-v0.1
description: Lightweight edge WAF MVP built on Cloudflare Snippets + Workers.

KV.description: Cloudflare KV namespace for bad IP markers such as bad:<ip> = 1

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare API token used by the runtime installer to create the Snippet

PROTECTED_HOSTNAME.description: Hostname protected by the Snippet, for example www.example.com

PROTECTED_PATH_PREFIX.description: Optional protected path prefix, for example /login

CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_NAME.description: Optional Cloudflare Zone name, for example example.com

scripts.check: node --check worker/index.js && node --check worker/scoring.js && node --check worker/challenge.js && node --check worker/utils.js && node --check worker/installer.js && node --check snippets/edge-gate.js && node --check public/check.js && node --check scripts/deploy-snippet.mjs && node --check scripts/deploy-cloudflare.mjs
